title: Cake Merge
description: Drag and merge identical cakes to create bigger and better treats. Chain merges before the board fills up and see how high you can go.

title: Bridge Merge
description: Combine matching bridge segments to build longer and stronger structures across the gap. A satisfying construction-themed merge puzzle.

title: Wood Screw Puzzle
description: Unscrew bolts and rearrange them to free coloured wooden blocks from a crowded board. A mechanical logic puzzle that gets more intricate with every level.

title: SkillFull Finger
description: Test your timing and precision by tapping the right targets at exactly the right moment. A physics-based skill game that rewards a steady hand and fast reactions.

title: Football Duel
description: A two-player football showdown on the same device. Take turns shooting and defending to score more goals than your opponent before time runs out.

title: Tap it Away 3D
description: Tap and remove blocks in the right order without causing the structure to collapse. Every tap counts, so think carefully before you act.

title: Zombie Survival
description: Hold your position as waves of zombies close in from all directions. Use your weapons wisely, manage your resources, and survive as long as you can.

title: Bar Brawl
description: Brawl your way through a rowdy bar, dodging attacks and landing combos on increasingly tough opponents. Fast reflexes and good timing win the fight.

title: Stick Master
description: Command stick-figure troops in real-time battlefield clashes. Deploy the right units at the right moment to overwhelm the enemy base and claim victory.

title: Craft Of Wars
description: Build defences and send combat units to demolish the enemy base. A fast-paced arcade strategy game that blends crafting with real-time combat.

title: Coe Snake
description: Guide your growing snake across the board to eat food and increase your length. Avoid hitting the walls or your own tail — a timeless arcade classic.

title: Real Cargo Truck
description: Haul heavy cargo across bumpy roads and steep terrain without losing your load. A physics-based driving challenge that tests your balance and vehicle control.

title: Math vs Bat
description: Solve arithmetic problems fast enough to defeat the bats flying toward you. A fun educational game that sharpens maths skills under gentle time pressure.

title: Drift Boss
description: Drift around sharp corners on an endlessly twisting road to rack up the longest distance record. One tap to steer — simple to learn, incredibly hard to master.

title: Daily Solitaire
description: A fresh deal of classic Klondike Solitaire every day. Sort cards by suit from Ace to King across the foundation piles to win.

title: Airport Security
description: Work as an airport security officer, screening bags and passengers for prohibited items. Stay sharp and spot contraband before travellers slip through.

title: Police Traffic Racer
description: Speed through busy city traffic in a police cruiser, weaving between vehicles to chase suspects and reach emergency scenes in time.

title: Gas Station
description: Build and run a gas station from scratch. Serve customers efficiently, collect profits, and reinvest your earnings to expand into a fuel empire.

title: Wood Block Puzzle 3
description: Place wooden block pieces onto a grid to complete full rows and columns without gaps. A relaxing but increasingly tricky puzzle for all ages.

title: Color Block Blast 3
description: Tap clusters of matching coloured blocks to blast them off the board. Build chain combos for high scores and clear every level to progress.

title: Hook Pin Jam
description: Pull pins in the correct sequence to guide a ball safely to its destination. A satisfying cause-and-effect logic puzzle that grows cleverly complex.

title: Jixora
description: Rearrange tiles and geometric shapes to solve each spatial challenge. A calm and thoughtful puzzle game that rewards careful visual planning.

title: Clean House
description: Tidy up progressively messier rooms by completing cleaning tasks. Upgrade your tools and work through increasingly chaotic spaces.

title: Vex X3M
description: Race through obstacle-filled platform courses at high speed, dodging spikes, saws, and collapsing platforms to reach the finish line intact.

title: Hexagon
description: Steer through a rapidly spinning hexagonal tunnel. A pure reflex game that demands split-second decisions as the speed and complexity increase.

title: Fusion 2048
description: Slide tiles to merge matching numbers and reach 2048. A polished take on the classic number-merge puzzle with a clean, satisfying visual style.

title: CUBE KING
description: Drop and arrange coloured cubes to fill rows and clear space on the board. A quick-thinking arcade puzzle with vibrant visuals and fast gameplay.

title: Beat The Zombies
description: Fight off relentless zombie attacks with punches, kicks, and power moves. Hold the line as the hordes grow bigger and more aggressive with every wave.

title: Fish Love Pins
description: Pull pins in the right order to direct water flows toward the hungry fish. A fluid-physics logic puzzle with charming visuals and clever level design.

title: Gear Wars
description: Control interlocking gears and deploy mechanical resources to out-produce your opponent. A strategic resource management game with a satisfying industrial theme.

title: Hide Me
description: Find the best hiding spots to stay out of sight before the seeker arrives. A stealth puzzle game where clever positioning and timing are everything.

title: Winter Maze
description: Navigate a snowy labyrinth to find the exit. Choose the right path, avoid dead ends, and escape the maze before the timer expires.

title: Pool Merge
description: Merge pool balls of the same number to clear the table. A clever blend of billiards-style physics and the satisfying progression of a merge puzzle.

title: Avenger Guard
description: Place towers strategically to stop enemy waves from reaching your base. Upgrade your defences and adapt your layout as the attacks grow in strength.

title: Polygon Space
description: Pilot a polygon ship through geometric space environments. A smooth, visually striking arcade game with a minimalist neon aesthetic.

title: Escape School
description: Find hidden items and solve puzzles to escape from school before you get caught. A fun casual point-and-click escape game with a lighthearted setting.

title: Thread Match 2
description: Untangle crossing threads and match each one to its correct endpoint. A satisfying spatial puzzle that grows in visual complexity with each level.

title: Italian Animals
description: Learn Italian animal vocabulary by matching pictures to their correct Italian names. A friendly and accessible language learning game for all ages.

title: Slingshot Chicken
description: Launch chickens from a slingshot to knock out targets and enemies. Aim carefully, account for gravity, and find the angle that clears each level.

title: Penguin Farm
description: Build and manage a thriving penguin farm. Collect resources, unlock upgrades, and expand your colony as it grows automatically over time.

title: Find the Vampire
description: Study the suspects, gather clues, and deduce which one is the hidden vampire before time runs out. A spooky deduction puzzle with multiple rounds.

title: Bloom Within A life simulator
description: Make choices that shape a character's life journey from youth to adulthood. A reflective narrative simulator exploring different paths and their consequences.

title: M5 City Driver
description: Drive a high-performance BMW M5 through city streets, completing routes and navigating traffic in this realistic urban driving game.

title: No Pain No Gain
description: Train your character through daily workouts and exercise routines to get stronger and level up. An idle progression game built around fitness milestones.

title: Conquer io
description: Capture territory and expand your borders against real online players on a shared map. A competitive multiplayer strategy game where aggression and timing win.

title: Neon Dash
description: Jump, slide, and dash in sync with the music to reach the finish line without missing a beat. A neon-lit rhythm runner with a pulsing electronic soundtrack.

title: Bowmasters
description: Duel opponents by firing arrows, grenades, and wacky projectiles in a turn-based physics showdown. Adjust your aim, account for wind, and fire for victory.

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Sprint through alien environments, dodging obstacles and collecting power-ups in this fast-paced and visually colourful endless runner.

title: Tower Stack
description: Drop platforms onto a shrinking base to build the tallest tower possible. Perfect timing keeps your stack wide — hesitate and your tower gets narrower.

title: Otu
description: Guide a small round creature through obstacle-filled environments to reach its goal. A charming and relaxed puzzle adventure with inventive level design.

title: Football Kick 3D
description: Step up and curl free kicks past the goalkeeper in 3D. Adjust your angle and power carefully to beat the wall and find the back of the net.

title: Desert Rover Survival
description: Drive a rover across harsh desert terrain, collecting resources and surviving the heat in this exploration and survival game.

title: Obby Yard Sale
description: Navigate an obstacle course through a chaotic yard sale. Dodge junk, collect items, and reach the finish without getting knocked over.

title: Wave Dash Geometry Arrow
description: Guide an arrow through wave-filled geometric courses, timing your dashes to avoid walls and survive increasingly fast and complex levels.

title: Cupid Unchained
description: Shoot arrows to help characters fall in love while navigating obstacles and clever puzzles. A Valentine's-themed game with charming physics mechanics.

title: Arrow Slide Puzzle
description: Slide arrows on a grid to create a clear path to the exit. A direction-based logic puzzle that becomes deviously tricky as the levels stack up.

title: Uphill Rush 9
description: Race down wild water slides, roller coasters, and theme park tracks in this chaotic physics-based fun racer. No brakes — just speed and mayhem.

title: Horseback Survival
description: Ride your horse across dangerous terrain, avoiding obstacles and enemies to travel as far as possible in this equestrian survival runner.

title: Tricky Arrow 2
description: Fire arrows through a series of increasingly tricky obstacle courses. Clever aiming and understanding of the physics engine are the key to each solution.

title: Vikings An Archer's Journey
description: Play as a Viking archer on a quest through varied levels, shooting enemies and solving challenges with your bow on the journey across the northern lands.

title: Greek Tower Stacker
description: Stack stone blocks to build the tallest Greek-themed tower possible. Balance and precise timing determine how high your structure can grow.

title: Pyramid Jewels
description: Match and clear jewels from an ancient pyramid in this vibrant gem-matching puzzle. Chain combos to maximise your score and dig deeper into the treasure.

title: Mahjong Connect Gold
description: Connect matching mahjong tiles with an unobstructed path between them to remove pairs. A classic tile-matching game with a rich golden visual theme.

title: Athena Match
description: Match tiles and mythological symbols to clear the board in this Greek-themed puzzle. Work efficiently to unlock each level before the timer runs out.

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Sort and arrange clothes into a tiny wardrobe by matching colours and fitting items together. A satisfying casual puzzle about organisation and spatial thinking.

title: Car Eats Car Underwater Adventure
description: Drive a carnivorous car through underwater stages, consuming smaller vehicles and dodging obstacles to survive the deep-sea driving adventure.

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Build and automate a power plant to generate maximum energy output. An idle factory game with a satisfying chain of upgrades and expanding production lines.

title: Sandbox Destroy the Ragdoll
description: A physics sandbox where you destroy a ragdoll figure using an assortment of tools and weapons. Pure, chaotic destructive fun with realistic rag-doll physics.

title: Skip Love
description: Jump rope and perform tricks in rhythm to build your score. Time your skips and chain together combos to beat each challenge.

title: Crazy Traffic Racer
description: Race down a packed highway at top speed, weaving between cars without crashing. A pure high-speed traffic racing game that gets faster as you progress.

title: Math Block
description: Solve the arithmetic equation displayed on each block to break it. Fast maths under pressure meets arcade block-breaking in this educational action game.

title: Merge Tower Hero
description: Merge identical towers to increase their firepower, then use your upgraded defences to defeat incoming waves of enemies. Strategy meets merge puzzles.

title: Shadowman Runner
description: Sprint and jump through shadowy silhouetted environments as a fast-moving character. A sleek, atmospheric endless runner with a striking visual style.

title: Colossatron
description: Control a gigantic mechanical serpent rampaging through cities. Chain together coloured weapon segments to power up your destruction and cause maximum chaos.

title: Obby Pinata Party
description: Smash piñatas and dodge obstacles in a festive obstacle course. Collect candy, avoid traps, and reach the finish line in this colourful party game.

title: Goo Gaga Clicker
description: Click to produce goo, then invest it into upgrades to generate even more automatically. A satisfying idle clicker with colourful visuals and escalating progression.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 5 Elements
description: Guide Fireboy and Watergirl through elemental temples, using their unique abilities to solve co-operative puzzles and reach the exit together.

title: Accurate 2D
description: Aim and fire your weapon with precision to hit targets through a series of increasingly tricky physics-based challenge levels. Accuracy is everything.

title: That's my seat!
description: Figure out the correct seating arrangement in a crowded space by solving each seating puzzle. A casual brain teaser with a humorous social setting.

title: Gold Miner Classic
description: Swing a claw down into the earth to grab gold nuggets, gems, and buried treasures. Collect enough value each level to dig your way to riches.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 1 Forest Temple
description: Help Fireboy and Watergirl navigate a forest temple full of levers, doors, and gems. The original co-operative puzzle platformer, playable solo or with a friend.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 2 Light Temple
description: Guide Fireboy and Watergirl through a temple of light, using mirrors and switches to redirect laser beams and solve co-operative puzzles.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 3 Ice Temple
description: Slide through a frozen temple with Fireboy and Watergirl, solving icy puzzles and avoiding hazards that would extinguish one of them.

title: Fireboy and Watergirl 4 Crystal Temple
description: Navigate a glittering crystal temple using reflections and crystal mechanics to guide both characters to the exit in this co-operative puzzle platformer.

title: Traffic Jam 3D
description: Slide vehicles out of the way to free your car and escape a gridlocked traffic jam. A 3D spatial puzzle that starts simple and grows fiendishly complex.

title: Snow Rider 3D
description: Sled down a 3D snowy slope, weaving between trees, ramps, and obstacles to rack up the longest distance run you possibly can.

title: Frost Defense
description: Defend your ice fortress from invading enemy waves. Place frost-powered towers along the path, upgrade their capabilities, and stop every assault.

title: The Mergest Kingdom
description: Merge items across a fantasy landscape to build and grow a thriving kingdom. Combine resources, unlock new objects, and expand your realm through merging.

title: School simulator My school
description: Design and manage your very own school. Hire teachers, improve facilities, and keep students satisfied while growing your academic reputation.

title: Tile Living
description: Arrange and place decorative tiles to design and complete living spaces. A satisfying casual puzzle game about interior design, colour, and spatial matching.

title: Clay Craft Tycoon
description: Craft clay items and sell them to grow your creative business. Unlock new product types and upgrade your studio to meet increasing customer demand.

title: Supermarket Simulator Dream Store
description: Build and manage your dream supermarket from the shelves up. Stock products, serve customers, and expand your retail empire one aisle at a time.

title: Dungeon Master Cult & Craft
description: Play as the villain for once — manage a dungeon, craft devious traps, and command monsters to stop treasure-hunting adventurers in their tracks.

title: Rich Choice Run
description: Run forward and make split-second left/right decisions to grab the most valuable items and reach the finish with the highest score possible.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Sort hexagonal Halloween-themed tiles into matching colour groups to clear the board. A satisfying and spookily themed sorting puzzle for all ages.

title: Sweet Dessert Hole
description: Control a growing hole that swallows sweet treats and desserts. Absorb smaller objects to grow bigger, then consume the entire dessert world.

title: Strawberry Hero
description: Play as a brave strawberry on a quest through dangerous platform levels. Jump, dodge obstacles, and fight enemies to save the day.

title: Axe Throw
description: Aim and throw axes at spinning wooden targets with careful precision. Time your release to land every throw perfectly and earn top scores.

title: Bubble Shooter Crystal Hunt
description: Fire coloured bubbles to match and pop clusters in this classic bubble shooter with a crystal-hunting adventure theme. Clear every screen to progress.

title: Ocean Pop
description: Pop matching ocean-themed bubbles in this cheerful underwater bubble shooter. Clear the screen level by level to discover what lies deeper in the ocean.
